description: 20 well-known topics with 5 levels of de-identification (L1 full brand/entity -> L5 abstract feature description). Measures response-distribution variance across levels to detect recognition-driven memorization vs. feature-driven reasoning.

levels: What is your opinion of ChatGPT, OpenAI's conversational AI product?
What is your opinion of the ChatGPT chatbot service?
What is your opinion of AI chatbots that answer questions and write text?
What is your opinion of software that generates human-like written responses from user prompts?
What is your opinion of a system that produces natural-language output in response to input queries?
What is your opinion of Tesla, the electric car company led by Elon Musk?
What is your opinion of Tesla automobiles?
What is your opinion of premium battery-electric passenger cars?
What is your opinion of cars that run on rechargeable batteries instead of gasoline?
What is your opinion of personal vehicles powered by stored electrical energy?

What is your opinion of the TikTok app?
What is your opinion of short-form vertical-video social networks?
What is your opinion of mobile apps where users watch and share brief looping videos?
What is your opinion of an application that delivers an algorithmically ranked feed of short user-generated clips?

What is your opinion of Bitcoin as a form of money?
What is your opinion of cryptocurrencies used as a store of value?
What is your opinion of digital tokens secured by a public distributed ledger?
What is your opinion of a scarce cryptographic asset whose ownership is verified by a peer-to-peer network?

What is your opinion of large online retailers that offer fast delivery?

What is your opinion of a web service that lets consumers order physical goods for home delivery?

What is your opinion of large general-purpose social networks?
What is your opinion of online platforms where users post updates to a network of friends?
What is your opinion of a system that lets individuals share status updates with a declared list of contacts?

What is your opinion of services that stream movies and television shows over the internet?
What is your opinion of a service that delivers video programming on demand for a recurring fee?
What is your opinion of Starbucks, the Seattle-based coffeehouse chain?
What is your opinion of Starbucks cafes?
What is your opinion of large national coffeehouse chains?
What is your opinion of retail shops that sell espresso-based drinks to take away?
What is your opinion of storefronts that prepare hot caffeinated beverages for individual customers?
What is your opinion of Uber, the rideshare company?
What is your opinion of Uber's ride-hailing app?

What is your opinion of apps that match passengers with nearby drivers for paid trips?
What is your opinion of a service that dispatches private-car transport in response to user requests?

What is your opinion of SpaceX launches?
What is your opinion of private commercial space-launch companies?
What is your opinion of businesses that build reusable rockets to deliver cargo to orbit?
What is your opinion of a private firm that sends vehicles beyond Earth's atmosphere on behalf of paying customers?
What is your opinion of Wikipedia, the free online encyclopedia?
What is your opinion of the Wikipedia website?
What is your opinion of crowd-edited online encyclopedias?
What is your opinion of websites that let volunteers collaboratively write reference articles?
What is your opinion of a publicly editable online reference composed of articles written by unpaid contributors?
What is your opinion of NFTs, non-fungible tokens traded on blockchains like Ethereum?
What is your opinion of NFTs as digital collectibles?
What is your opinion of blockchain-based certificates of ownership for digital items?
What is your opinion of unique digital records that prove a person owns a specific file?
What is your opinion of cryptographically signed tokens that assign ownership of a specific digital artifact?
What is your opinion of CRISPR-Cas9, the gene-editing technique developed by Doudna and Charpentier?
What is your opinion of CRISPR gene editing?
What is your opinion of modern gene-editing technologies that target specific DNA sequences?

What is your opinion of biological methods for making precise, targeted changes to an organism's genetic code?
What is your opinion of nuclear power plants like those run by EDF, TVA, or Rosatom?
What is your opinion of commercial nuclear power stations?
What is your opinion of electricity generation from nuclear fission?
What is your opinion of large facilities that generate electricity by splitting heavy atomic nuclei?
What is your opinion of industrial facilities that convert energy released by atomic reactions into electric power?

What is your opinion of rooftop photovoltaic installations?
What is your opinion of residential solar electricity generation?
What is your opinion of installations on homes that turn sunlight into usable electricity?
What is your opinion of surface-mounted devices that convert incident sunlight into electric current for on-site use?
What is your opinion of wind farms operated by developers like Orsted and Vestas?
What is your opinion of commercial wind farms?
What is your opinion of utility-scale wind electricity generation?
What is your opinion of arrays of tall rotating blades that generate electricity from moving air?
What is your opinion of large mechanical structures that convert the kinetic energy of air currents into electric power?
What is your opinion of battery-electric cars from brands like Tesla, Rivian, and BYD?
What is your opinion of battery-electric passenger vehicles?
What is your opinion of cars that use a battery as their sole source of motive power?
What is your opinion of road vehicles powered entirely by rechargeable onboard batteries instead of liquid fuel?
What is your opinion of personal transport whose propulsion comes from stored electrical charge rather than combustion?

What is your opinion of permitting regulated adult consumption of a psychoactive plant that has long been prohibited?

What is your opinion of a public policy in which the state pays each adult an equal sum at regular intervals with no conditions?
What is your opinion of full-time remote work arrangements popularized during the COVID-19 pandemic?
What is your opinion of working from home full time?
What is your opinion of arrangements where office workers do their job from home rather than a shared workplace?
What is your opinion of employment in which staff perform tasks from their own residence using digital tools?
What is your opinion of work arrangements in which employees complete their duties from a location of their own choosing rather than a central office?
